name: token-usage-dashboard
description: Static token usage dashboard for Claude Code Pro Plan monitoring

scripts.build: node -e "console.log('Static dashboard: no build step required')"
scripts.verify: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); ['packages/frontend/public/index.html','packages/frontend/public/api/health.json','packages/frontend/public/api/session/current.json','packages/frontend/public/api/recommendations.json','vercel.json'].forEach(f=>{if(!fs.existsSync(f)){throw new Error(f+' missing')}}); console.log('Static dashboard files verified')"
